title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 17–19, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: tribute?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's he talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's money we have to pay month after month.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We have to buy our very own lives from them with money...! Adults, kids, everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: So if there's even one person in an entire village who fails to pay his tribute... even a single person,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: His entire village will be destroyed just like Gosa Village!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A whole town d-destroyed because of a single person...!? Talk about cruel!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's life under Arlong's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: with their "racial doctrine,"

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: They don't even think twice about killing a human.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hear me well, inferior humans! All you need to do is work hard and pay the tribute! There's no need to think about anything else!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What I need is an enormous sum of money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your tribute will soon become the corner- stone,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: of my arlong empire that will rule all of East Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now hurry up and get out of here,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Before Arlong comes back!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 7/11/13/ #HmethD-op

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Let's go forward.. USOPP pirate's ballad..

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
